title: HeadyAPI — The Developer API for Heady™
description: HeadyAPI provides full programmatic access to the entire Heady™ ecosystem. REST and GraphQL dual API surface with 15 core endpoints, interactive browser playground, φ-scaled rate limiting with golden ratio burst allowances, SDK libraries for JavaScript/TypeScript and Python, WebSocket streaming for real-time agent output, OpenAPI 3.1 specification, and granular API key management with scoping, rotation, and audit logging.
ogDescription: REST + GraphQL + WebSocket. 15 endpoints, 4 SDKs, interactive playground, φ-scaled rate limiting. Full programmatic access to the Heady™ AI ecosystem for developers and teams.
